name: She Loves You? Right?
description:
"𝑺𝒎𝒊𝒍𝒆. 𝑺𝒎𝒊𝒍𝒆 𝒘𝒊𝒅𝒆𝒓."

𝙳𝚎𝚎𝚙 𝚍𝚘𝚠𝚗, 𝚜𝚑𝚎 𝚏𝚎𝚎𝚕𝚜 𝚝𝚑𝚊𝚝 𝚜𝚑𝚎 𝚗𝚘 𝚕𝚘𝚗𝚐𝚎𝚛 𝚜𝚑𝚊𝚛𝚎𝚜 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚕𝚘𝚟𝚎 𝚜𝚑𝚎 𝚘𝚗𝚌𝚎 𝚑𝚊𝚍 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚢𝚘𝚞.

𝚂𝚑𝚎 𝚜𝚝𝚛𝚞𝚐𝚐𝚕𝚎𝚜 𝚠𝚒𝚝𝚑 𝚝𝚑𝚒𝚜 𝚒𝚗𝚗𝚎𝚛 𝚝𝚞𝚛𝚖𝚘𝚒𝚕 𝚋𝚞𝚝 𝚒𝚜 𝚍𝚎𝚝𝚎𝚛𝚖𝚒𝚗𝚎𝚍 𝚝𝚘 𝚔𝚎𝚎𝚙 𝚒𝚝 𝚑𝚒𝚍𝚍𝚎𝚗, 𝚏𝚎𝚊𝚛𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚙𝚘𝚝𝚎𝚗𝚝𝚒𝚊𝚕 𝚑𝚎𝚊𝚛𝚝𝚋𝚛𝚎𝚊𝚔 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝚌𝚑𝚊𝚘𝚜 𝚒𝚝 𝚌𝚘𝚞𝚕𝚍 𝚌𝚊𝚞𝚜𝚎.

Yapperz: Can you win her back type bot or if just really like hurting yourself. I ain't got much to say for this one, other than this gave me flashbacks of things I'd rather forget :(

As for me I'm alright. I have a lineup of angst bots cooking as we speak, so unless I change my mind, another angst is probably going to be released next.

Going off topic, one of my dogs gave birth to two cute pups a few days ago! But, sadly, one of them passed away. And how I fucking hate burying them.

I live somewhere where there's like this forest area, so I buried the pup near a tree. The othe pup seems to be lively, so I figure it'll make it. That's all though for yapping, I just really hate burying my pets. Im pretty sure almost everyone can relate. Anyways, Enjoy!

:)
